arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford is LEFT OUT of Man United's 21-man squad for Europa League trip to Bucharest... just days after Ruben Amorim said he'd rather play his 63-year-old goalkeeper coach
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has been sent another reminder from Ruben Amorim that he is not part of his future plans after he was left out of Manchester United's 21-man squad for the Europa League trip to Bucharest.

arts.ttl: Rasmus Hojlund 'on trial' at Man United until end of season amid Ruben Amorim concerns
arts.sum: Manchester United forward Rasmus Hojlund reportedly faces a fight to save his Old Trafford career after failing to convince head coach Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: What Manchester United are now thinking about Casemiro after offloading Antony to Real Betis
Marcus Rashford and Luke Shaw train with squad but not included against FCSB
arts.sum: Shaw has been out since the start of December.

arts.ttl: Ayden Heaven move sees Manchester United start to tackle embarrassing £68m truth
arts.sum: Manchester United are closing in on a deal for Arsenal teenager Ayden Heaven

arts.ttl: Man Utd close to signing Lecce left-back Dorgu
arts.sum: Manchester United are close to completing a deal for Lecce and Denmark left-back Patrick Dorgu.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Tottenham Target 'Wants to Join Man Utd'
arts.sum: Man Utd are reportedly interested in signing Mathys Tel, and insider Paul O Keefe has said he favours an Old Trafford move over Arsenal or Tottenham.

arts.ttl: 'He has everything' - Harry Maguire names Man United teammate who can become 'elite' player
arts.sum: Manchester United centre-back Harry Maguire has lauded teammates Leny Yoro and Matthijs de Ligt following their arrivals at the club last summer.

arts.sum: The project could cost more than £2 billion
